reviewed_prompts.title: RUNTIME_SERVICES-0
reviewed_prompts.continuity_warning: Legacy planning inventory still labels Φ-2 as EVENT_LOG-0 and places RUNTIME_SERVICES-0 at Φ-4.

phi_may_assume: The Λ semantic constitution is complete enough to serve as binding input.
AGENTS.md is the canonical governance source.
The runtime substrate already exists across engine, game, app, compat, control, core, net, process, server/runtime, and server/persistence.
runtime/ exists only as a thin helper root and is not the clear canonical orchestrator home.
Early Φ is extraction and consolidation over live substrate rather than clean-room invention.
phi_must_not_assume: Runtime work may redefine semantic doctrine or domain ownership.
Shared code adjacency implies bridge law or semantic authority.
Governance mirrors, natural-language task bridge, or MCP surfaces already exist.
schemas/** may replace schema/** as semantic contract law.
packs/** and data/packs/** are a resolved single-root family.
Generated echoes are authoritative runtime law.

ownership_projection_cautions.rule: Treat field/** only as a transitional compatibility facade.
Use schemas/** operationally only; semantic boundary decisions must follow schema/**.

ownership_projection_cautions.canonical_owner: packs/** within runtime packaging and activation scope
ownership_projection_cautions.scoped_owner: data/packs/** within authored content and declaration scope
ownership_projection_cautions.rule: Do not flatten the family into a single-root winner.
Specs own normative semantic meaning; registries are operational mirrors.
Planning JSON may not override the more specific checkpoint and planning review prose.
Evidence only unless a stronger source explicitly promotes an emitted artifact.

rationale: The engine/game/app spine and runtime substrate cluster clearly exist.
Σ-0 now provides enough authority, validation, and ownership discipline for kernel-boundary extraction.
The main caution is to extract from distributed substrate without promoting runtime/ or redefining semantic law.
A component model can follow Φ-0 if it stays narrowly structural.
The live repo contains enough component-adjacent substrate across app, compat, control, core, net, process, and server roots.
It must not smuggle in task catalog, mirror, or MCP concerns that belong to later Σ work.
Runtime-service-like substrate already exists across control, compat, core, net, process, server/runtime, and server/persistence.
Σ-0 is sufficient to keep service extraction from drifting into semantic or ownership law.
Legacy planning inventory still labels RUNTIME_SERVICES-0 as Φ-4 and therefore the numbering drift must be carried forward explicitly.

prohibited_moves: reinterpret capability surfaces as runtime-only constructs
bind runtime boundaries to non-canonical projected or transitional roots
flatten packs/** and data/packs/** into one ownership root
assume governance mirrors or natural-language task bridge already exist
treat runtime/ as the obvious canonical orchestrator home
overfit to code adjacency and mistake it for bridge law
use generated echoes or caches as canonical runtime policy

should_wait_for: Φ-1 component ownership and attach-point map
early runtime-service cluster or boundary map
why: Governance mirrors should reference the first stable runtime boundary vocabulary rather than stale pre-Φ assumptions.

should_wait_for: Φ-1 component ownership and attach-point map
early runtime-service cluster or boundary map
explicit clarification of the Φ-2 versus Φ-4 runtime-services numbering drift
why: Natural-language task mapping should not promise runtime task surfaces before the first stable runtime boundary vocabulary exists.

final_verdict.summary: Σ-0 is sufficient for early Φ-A1. Early Φ may proceed as bounded runtime kernel, component, and service boundary extraction over live substrate, while carrying forward all ownership cautions and the legacy prompt-numbering drift explicitly.
required_corrections: Treat early Φ-A1 as bounded extraction and consolidation rather than implementation or semantic reinterpretation.
Carry forward Λ-5.5 ownership cautions unchanged.
Record the legacy Φ-2 versus Φ-4 naming drift explicitly instead of hiding it.

consumed_by: the third early Φ-A1 runtime-service boundary prompt
